content: Chrome MV3: background is an ephemeral service worker (no global state; persist to chrome.storage; register listeners synchronously at top level). Content script <-> service worker via chrome.runtime.sendMessage/onMessage; SW -> content script via chrome.tabs.sendMessage; long-lived channels via chrome.runtime.connect ports. Side panel API (chrome.sidePanel) supports per-tab panels via setOptions and setPanelBehavior({openPanelOnActionClick:true}); sidePanel.open() requires a user gesture. Cross-origin fetches should go through the background context, not content scripts.
